title: Lock Patient Database and Booking List behind Internet Identity authentication

requirements.text: Protect the Patient Database page so that only authenticated users (logged in via Internet Identity) can view or interact with it. Unauthenticated visitors must see a locked/access-denied state with a prominent 'Login with Internet Identity' button and cannot see any patient records or the add-patient form.

quotes: i want to lock patient data base and booking list

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /patient-database while logged out shows a lock screen or access-denied message, not patient records.
A 'Login with Internet Identity' button is clearly visible on the lock screen.
After successful login the patient records table and add-patient dialog are fully accessible.
Logging out redirects away from or re-locks the Patient Database page.

requirements.text: Protect the Bookings List page so that only authenticated users (logged in via Internet Identity) can view it. Unauthenticated visitors must see a locked/access-denied state with a prominent 'Login with Internet Identity' button and cannot see any booking records.

quotes: i want to lock patient data base and booking list

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /bookings-list while logged out shows a lock screen or access-denied message, not booking cards.
A 'Login with Internet Identity' button is clearly visible on the lock screen.
After successful login the bookings list with all booking cards is fully accessible.
Logging out redirects away from or re-locks the Bookings List page.

requirements.text: Add a Login/Logout control in the shared Layout header. When the user is not authenticated, show a 'Login' button that triggers Internet Identity login. When authenticated, show the user's principal (abbreviated) and a 'Logout' button. Use the existing useInternetIdentity hook.

quotes: i want to lock patient data base and booking list

acceptanceCriteria: Header displays a Login button when not authenticated.
Header displays abbreviated principal and a Logout button when authenticated.
Clicking Login opens the Internet Identity flow.
Clicking Logout ends the session and the protected pages become locked again.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts — use them as-is.
The public Booking form page (/booking) must remain accessible to unauthenticated users — only the admin-facing Bookings List and Patient Database are locked.
Do not change the backend data model or access control — restriction is frontend-only.
nonGoals: Backend-level authentication or canister access control
Role-based access control beyond simple authenticated/unauthenticated
Locking the public Booking submission form
